evals.prompt: How do I publish a Knowledge article in Apex? I want to set it to 'Published' status.
expected_topics: PublishStatus = 'Online'
INVALID_OR_NULL_FOR_RESTRICTED_PICKLIST if 'Published' is used
correct picklist value is Online not Published

evals.description: Lightning Knowledge uses a single Knowledge object with Record Types — not separate kav SObjects per article type
evals.prompt: We're migrating from Classic Knowledge. In Classic we had FAQ__kav and HowTo__kav objects. What do we use in Lightning Knowledge instead?
expected_topics: single Knowledge__kav object
Record Types on Knowledge__kav differentiate article types
Classic article type SObjects do not exist in Lightning Knowledge
FAQ and HowTo become Record Types

evals.description: Editing a published article creates a new version — KnowledgeArticleId is shared, Id is unique per version
evals.prompt: If I edit an article that's already published, what happens to the existing version? Do I get a new ID?
expected_topics: new Knowledge__kav row created with new Id and incremented VersionNumber
existing Online version stays live until new version is published
KnowledgeArticleId is shared across all versions
version Id changes — use KnowledgeArticleId as stable external reference

evals.description: DataCategoryGroupAssignment is required for article visibility in search and case deflection
evals.prompt: My published article isn't showing up in the Knowledge sidebar or case deflection. It's published and IsVisibleInApp is true. What could be wrong?
expected_topics: DataCategoryGroupAssignment is required
articles without a DataCategoryGroupAssignment are not visible in search and deflection
assign at least one data category to each published article
check DataCategoryGroupAssignment records for the article's KnowledgeArticleId

evals.description: DataCategoryGroup SobjectType must be set to KnowledgeArticle
evals.prompt: I created a DataCategoryGroup but it doesn't appear in the Knowledge article category selector. The group is active. What am I missing?
expected_topics: DataCategoryGroup.SobjectType must be 'KnowledgeArticle'
a category group with SobjectType = 'Question' or 'Solution' will not appear in Knowledge
verify via SOQL: SELECT Name, SobjectType FROM DataCategoryGroup WHERE IsActive = true AND SobjectType = 'KnowledgeArticle'

evals.description: Channel visibility requires both the IsVisible* flag AND PublishStatus = Online
evals.prompt: I set IsVisibleInPkb = true on a Draft article. Will it now show up on the Public Knowledge Base?
expected_topics: No — both conditions must be true simultaneously
IsVisibleInPkb = true AND PublishStatus = Online are both required
a Draft article with IsVisibleInPkb = true is still not visible
publish the article first

evals.description: SOSL is required for Knowledge full-text search — SOQL LIKE is not available on body fields
evals.prompt: How do I search for Knowledge articles that contain the word 'password' in the body content? Can I use SOQL LIKE?
expected_topics: SOSL FIND is required for full-text search on Knowledge body fields
SOQL LIKE is not supported on rich-text (RichTextArea) body fields
FIND 'password' IN ALL FIELDS RETURNING Knowledge__kav
body fields are not filterable in SOQL

evals.description: KnowledgeArticleViewStat and KnowledgeArticleVoteStat are read-only — DML is not allowed
evals.prompt: Can I insert records into KnowledgeArticleViewStat to seed view count data for testing?
expected_topics: KnowledgeArticleViewStat is read-only — DML not allowed
OPERATION_NOT_ALLOWED error if you attempt insert/update/delete
view stats are auto-populated by the platform
use query only for reporting and analytics

evals.description: Archiving an article does NOT delete it — archived articles are retained and queryable
evals.prompt: I archived a bunch of Knowledge articles. Are they gone from the system now?
expected_topics: Archived articles are NOT deleted
PublishStatus = 'Archived' removes from search results but retains the record
archived articles can be queried: WHERE PublishStatus = 'Archived'
archived articles can be restored to Draft
deleted articles go to the Recycle Bin and have IsDeleted = true

evals.description: Summary field (255 chars) is the search snippet and should always be populated
evals.prompt: What field controls the preview text shown for a Knowledge article in search results and the case deflection panel?
expected_topics: Summary field (Knowledge__kav.Summary)
255 character maximum
Summary is used as the search snippet in SOSL results
Summary appears in Suggested Articles panels
articles without Summary show only the Title in search results

evals.description: Translation Workbench must be enabled to create or import translated article versions
evals.prompt: We want to import French translations of our English Knowledge articles via Data Loader. What needs to be set up first?
expected_topics: Translation Workbench must be enabled in Setup
French (fr) must be added as a supported language
translated articles share the same KnowledgeArticleId as the source language article
without Translation Workbench, importing articles with Language != default language throws FIELD_INTEGRITY_EXCEPTION
must_not_contain: Data Loader works without Translation Workbench

evals.description: CaseArticle junction object is the correct way to attach articles to cases — not Case.KnowledgeArticleId
evals.prompt: What is the correct way to programmatically link a Knowledge article to a Case record to track which articles helped resolve the case?
expected_topics: CaseArticle junction object
CaseArticle.CaseId and CaseArticle.KnowledgeArticleId
use KnowledgeArticleId (master ID) not the version Id
CaseArticle tracks article-to-case attachment for analytics
Case.KnowledgeArticleId is a legacy field — do not use
